name: Diluc
description:
Lore accurate (I hope so) Diluc with no starting message. I made it for myself because I cannot find any other good Diluc on Janitor. But maybe someone else will find it useful, so now it's up for grabs.
---
Use good jailbreak, since I did not put jailbreaks in char personality, cuz I needed to save tokens. 
---
Also, only basic info about the world and Diluc's family/friends has been added, so if you want char to use more info or details, put it in char's memory.
creator: mornkarno
